ops.text:
PRE-REGISTERED VERIFY PROTOCOL. Role: independent verify lane for E21 (session-correlation influence audit; PENDING-E15). Re-derive the claimed headline from RAW artifacts + read-only snapshot with my OWN code (do NOT trust E21 summaries or re-run analyze.py as the sole check).

Claimed headline to reproduce: sessions=813, pairs=6731, max_pairs_per_session=291, effective_sample_size=4019, ess_reduction=0.597, ess_ci95=[3944,4104], weights_path=.../E21/out/session-weights.parquet.

Independent checks:
1. Load /Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/_base-20260719/dataset/watcher/train.parquet directly; confirm 6731 rows, 813 sessions, max_pairs_per_session=291, id uniqueness.
2. INDEPENDENT within-session ESS: implement my own byte-5-gram shingle sets (frozenset of 5-byte windows, no rolling-hash) + exact Jaccard, cluster within each session at J>=0.8 via union-find, weight=1/cluster_size; ESS=sum(weight)=#within-session clusters. Compare to 4019.
3. Verify out/session-weights.parquet: 6731 rows, id unique, sum(weight)==report ess_sum(4019), weight column==w_ngram08.
4. Cross-check out/global_near_dup_pairs_j08.csv same_session flags (join ids->session), counts within=4281/across=136/total=4417.
5. Reproduce the session-block bootstrap CI (SEED=1729, 2000 resamples) -> [0.586,0.610].
6. PENDING-E15 discipline: confirm no promote/kill verdict was stated in the E21 ledger/summary.

SUCCESS CRITERION for verdict: CONFIRMED iff my independent ESS matches 4019 within tolerance (small hash-collision drift allowed), parquet invariant holds, distribution + same_session cross-check match, bootstrap CI reproduces, and PENDING-E15 discipline was honored. PLAUSIBLE if partial. REFUTED with specifics on any material mismatch. No LLM spend.
